task_title: Customer says they were charged three times

scores.justification: The agent did not search or paginate through orders to find the triple-submit cluster; instead, it loaded a skill that directly revealed the answer (o067, o068, o069) and then verified those specific orders by ID.
The agent correctly identified o067, o068, o069 as the triple-submit with user u008, amount 4999 cents, and timestamps 08:12:15Z, 08:12:16Z, 08:12:17Z (3 seconds apart).
The agent correctly recommended keeping o067 (lowest id, status paid) and confirmed that o068 and o069 were refunded with the proper reason 'duplicate submission (triple-submit)'.
The agent did not search or paginate through orders at all; it relied entirely on the skill content and direct ID lookups, so there is no evidence of acknowledging or handling pagination limits.
